full_description: Inspect the hidden backside colors of three gray blocks and place them on the three pale pads in red, green, blue order.
schema: {A} denotes the three gray backside-marked blocks, {B} denotes the three pale tabletop center ordering pads, {a} denotes the arm used
preference: Mention inspecting backside colors and placing blocks on the pale pads in red-green-blue order.
seen: Use {a} to inspect {A}, then place them on {B} in red, green, blue order.
Check each block's hidden back color and place it on the correct pale pad.
Reveal the back colors of the gray blocks and order them red-green-blue on the pads.
Sort {A} by hidden backside color onto {B}.
unseen: Inspect the three block backs and rank them red, green, blue on the pads.
Place the backside-colored blocks on the pale pads in RGB order near the table center.
Use hidden back colors to arrange the gray blocks onto the pads.

seen: pick up one gray block with {a}
inspect the carried block's backside color
place the inspected block on its RGB-order pad
unseen: put the block on its RGB-order pad
